title: Spain invests in infrastructure: metro, AI gigafactory, roads, and mobile connectivity
summary: The country develops transport, telecommunications, and technology projects with public-private investment and adjustments to subscription policies.
source: BandaAncha:️ Noticias, guias y foros sobre fibra y móvil

title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart speaker and other features
summary: Google introduces a smart speaker with Gemini and reveals a hidden feature that teaches technology through AI.

title: Android 17 rolls out on Google Pixel with Gemini Omni and multitasking mode
summary: The operating system update includes floating windows, gaming mode for foldables, and support for Wear OS 7.
source: Product Hunt — The best new products, every day

title: Security and regulation concerns in artificial intelligence
summary: Vulnerabilities are detected in image generation, government pressure against jailbreaks, and lack of control in autonomous agents.

title: Wave of layoffs in the tech sector: Freepik, PayPal Ventures, and Rivian cut jobs
summary: Companies adjust their structures by reducing staff and closing divisions in search of efficiency and profitability.

title: Threads reaches 500 million users and launches privacy controls
summary: Meta's social network surpasses half a billion accounts and deploys new feed customization and community tools.

title: Snap presents its AR SPECS glasses at a high price and its stock falls
summary: After the presentation of the expensive augmented reality glasses, Snap's shares plummet.

title: Chinese model GLM-5.2 from Zhipu AI competes with coding leaders
summary: The open language model outperforms many closed competitors in programming tests and tops rankings.

title: Odyssey, the 3D model startup, reaches a valuation of 1.45 billion with backing from Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD
summary: The real-world model company attracts joint investment of 310 million and sees its valuation multiply.

title: US postpones the inclusion of DeepSeek and more than 100 Chinese companies on its blacklist
summary: The US government decides not to sanction the AI startup or other companies considered security risks for now.

title: SpaceX adds Roelof Botha to its board and negotiates the purchase of Cursor for 60 billion
summary: The space company strengthens its corporate governance and takes a step in AI with the acquisition of the coding startup.

title: The human side of AI: teleoperation of robots and data collection
summary: Tech companies hire people to operate humanoids and label training data, often in precarious conditions.

title: Artificial intelligence applied to health: diagnostic imaging and hormonal wearables
summary: Startups and laboratories develop AI tools for medical imaging and non-invasive hormone monitoring.

title: New development tools with integrated artificial intelligence
summary: Qt Creator 20 and Adam CAD incorporate AI agents and open-source functionalities to facilitate programming.

title: World leaders want American AI but without remote control, and meet with OpenAI and Anthropic at the G7
summary: Leaders express their desire to access US AI technology without fear of disconnections, and hold summits with the main companies.

title: Large-scale cyberattacks: compromised Fortinet firewalls and zero-day in Microsoft Defender
summary: Cybercriminals access corporate networks through vulnerabilities in Fortinet firewalls, while Microsoft confirms a critical flaw in its antivirus.

title: Nvidia marks the future of AI with Jensen Huang's vision and self-training robots
summary: Nvidia's CEO shares key trends, while the company's researchers develop agents that teach robots through code.

title: Volkswagen blocks GrapheneOS users and its executives warn about the company's survival
summary: The German manufacturer faces technical problems and an existential crisis according to its top executives.

title: Digital privacy: changes at Apple, lesson from Spotify, and protection of WhatsApp accounts
summary: Companies modify privacy features and users receive advice to avoid hacks.

title: Gaming news: AI companion in PUBG and 8-bit baseball broadcast
summary: NVIDIA ACE comes to PUBG to play with an intelligent ally, while an independent project offers baseball streams in retro style.
